phase_1_prd.reason: no PRD; analysis doc used as input

issues.description: Missing standalone ## Decisions section; decisions embedded in Architecture
issues.resolution: Added ## Decisions section with decision table and ADR-0006 acceptance note

issues.description: Layer ordering places implementation (Layer 2) before unit tests (Layer 4); TDD not enforced at macro level
issues.resolution: Added TDD ordering note in Test Plan clarifying that Tasks 4.1-4.3 should be written before Layer 2 implementation tasks

issues.description: Task 4.5 ambiguous about whether new tests replace test_get_ruling_text_resource xfail
issues.resolution: Reworded Task 4.5 to state tests are new tool-level tests and do NOT fix/remove the xfail

issues.description: ADR-0006 still marked Proposed; must be Accepted before execution
issues.resolution: Added note in Decisions section requiring ADR-0006 be marked Accepted at execution start

issues.description: metrics JSON reported total=11 tasks but plan has 14
issues.resolution: Updated metrics JSON total from 11 to 14

issues.description: Task 2.3 did not show extract_sections return logic using tribunal_scope=scope; executor could hardcode 'other'/'ts_tc' instead
issues.resolution: Added explicit return code block to Task 2.3 showing tribunal_scope=scope assignment

issues.description: _HEADER_RE with re.DOTALL could match Tipo de Resolución: in document body if optional fields absent
issues.resolution: Accepted per ADR-0006 consequences clause: atypical documents return parse_successful=False; well-formed PDFs safe

issues.description: Task 4.5 integration tests for TSJ/AN required an ECLI lookup HTML fixture not specified in Layer 3
issues.resolution: Added Mock HTTP setup note to Task 4.5 documenting reuse of ecli_lookup.html and _make_minimal_pdf() inline pattern

issues.description: No test for Auto quoting a full Sentencia (priority ordering edge case)
issues.resolution: Edge case; low real-world probability. ADR-0006 documents Sentencia-first priority intent. Deferred to follow-up.

issues.description: Smoke check only prints tipo_resolucion; could verify more Parser 0 fields
issues.resolution: Smoke check is for manual verification only; unit tests cover all fields. No change needed.

pr.title: feat(parser): extend scope to collegial courts, add Auto format + PDF metadata extraction
